risks.title: EU data residency scope unresolved for backup storage
risks.description: Customer has not confirmed whether EU data residency applies to backup storage volumes. If the requirement applies, the current architecture does not comply and a redesign will be required before go-live.
mitigations: Schedule clarification call with customer by 2024-11-15
Prepare two architecture options (residency in-scope vs. out-of-scope)
Do not release the backup service until confirmed

risks.title: mTLS certificate rotation mechanism not designed
risks.description: ADR-001 requires mTLS for all inter-service communication but the certificate rotation mechanism has not been designed. Manual rotation creates operational risk and potential for service disruption.
mitigations: Add certificate rotation test to the Definition of Done
Include rotation runbook in the go-live checklist

risks.title: Penetration test vendor selection timeline
risks.description: The customer's procurement process for the pen test vendor takes approximately 6 weeks. If selection is not initiated by end of Month 2, the test cannot be completed before the Phase 2 go-live target.
mitigations: Initiate pen test vendor selection no later than 2024-11-30
Identify a backup vendor in case primary selection is delayed
Flag to Programme Sponsor if timeline slips
